issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNED A 2018 MITSUBISHI MIRAGE. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 25 MPH, THE CONTACT LOST CONTROL OF THE VEHICLE AND IT FLIPPED OVER THREE TIMES. THE FRONTAL AIR BAGS DID NOT DEPLOY. A POLICE REPORT WAS FILED. THE VEHICLE WAS DESTROYED AND TOWED. THE FIRE DEPARTMENT WA

narrative.headline: What 2018 Mitsubishi Mirage owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 10 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (40% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
